item.title: About Me
item.description:
Life is lot like distributed backend, multiple tasks to perform each day, multiple roles to fit in but interestingly all by a single individual. Atleast this is not a case when working on a software application where I can define exact responsibility and expectations from each service running individually.

Hi, I am Vijit, currently developing distributed reliable systems for the fintech industry here in India.

It is facinating to design how a distributed application can communicate amongst itself and perform a certain task. As facinating as it could get while designing each component of a distributed system, it gets more and more interesting building one by hand, and the facination does not stop there, it grows seeing pods spin-up real time, scale, perform and not to mention break.
